message:
feat(beads): update issue tracking journal with completed tasks and new bug report

Closed issues:
- bd-64nap: RU webapp content verification — confirmed complete
- bd-65jkw: CASR installation logic added to install.sh
- bd-66cjz: CASR onboarding lesson created
- bd-67e19: PCR E2E installation test expanded with hook validation,
  SessionStart JSON checks, bash -n syntax verification

New issue:
- bd-675xo: Bug report for .next artifact races in multi-agent workspace —
  concurrent bun build/dev processes can corrupt shared .next directory
  causing nondeterministic build failures (missing files, ENOTEMPTY errors)
